ddls:
CREATE TABLE "newspapers" (
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newspaper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the newspaper */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of publication (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the newspaper */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "first_published_year" INTEGER /* Year the newspaper first started publishing */,
  "last_published_year" INTEGER /* Year the newspaper last published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the newspaper */,
  "digitization_status" TEXT /* Status of digitization */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated newspaper */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of publication */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of publication */,
  "issue_number" TEXT /* Unique issue number for the newspaper */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the issue */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the issue */,
  "digitization_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was digitized */,
  "digitization_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the digitized issue */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated issue */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "page" INTEGER /* Page number where the article is located */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the newspaper where the article is located */,
  "article_length" INTEGER /* Length of the article in words */,
  "digitization_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was digitized */,
  "digitization_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the digitized article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the article */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, librarian, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the item */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newspaper for which metadata is requested */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific issue for which metadata is requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the request */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_requests_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_requests_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* The text of the search query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was made */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of the search query */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the search */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with this permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
